productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed Black Sweatshirt
description: Composition Black Official Merchandise manchester united sweatshirt made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has round neck with contrast inner neck binding, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed panel running from cuff to hem on inner arm and side, Manchester United branding printed across chest and ribbed hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron, do not iron on print Dress for greatness with this Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club sweatshirt. This long sleeved top pays homage to the incredibly successful team with bold text across the front and club badge. Team this with jeans and a tee for a trip to a football match or for casual outings when only the genuine Man U article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
